articles.title: California Resources Corporation (CRC) Presents at 2026 NYSE Investor Access Day-Spring Energy & Utilities - Slideshow — 2026-03-24. The following slide deck was published by California Resources Corporation in conjunction with this event.
California Resources Boosted By Rising Brent-WTI Spread — Unlike most U.S. oil producers, CRC's pricing is based on Brent, which has become meaningfully higher than WTI.
A Look At California Resources (CRC) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum
